scripts.build: npm run build -w @xhs-md/core && npm run build -w @xhs-md/web && npm run build -w xhs-md-renderer
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @xhs-md/core && npm run build -w @xhs-md/core && npm run typecheck -w xhs-md-renderer && npm run typecheck -w @xhs-md/web
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
